guide.hero.title: How to use TestFormatter?
guide.hero.subtitle: A step-by-step guide to converting your tests into HEMIS and Kahoot formats
guide.step1.title: Upload your test file
guide.step1.desc: Drag and drop your test file into the upload zone or click "browse files". The file is processed in your browser — no data is sent to any server.
guide.step1.tip: Supports .txt and .docx formats. If you're unsure about the format, download the sample files.
guide.step2.title: Preview your questions
guide.step2.desc: The uploaded file is automatically parsed. All questions and answers are displayed in a list. Correct answers are highlighted in green.
guide.step2.tip: If you see a warning icon, there's an issue with the question — such as no correct answer marked or too few answer options.
guide.step3.title: Choose format and download
guide.step3.desc: Select HEMIS or Kahoot format and click "Download". The file will be automatically downloaded to your computer.
guide.step3.tip: HEMIS — a .txt file for the university system. Kahoot — an .xlsx file for interactive quizzes.
guide.formats.title: Supported Formats
guide.formats.txtDesc: Plain text file. Questions are numbered, answers are labeled A), B), C), D), and the correct answer is marked with an * symbol.
guide.formats.docxDesc: Microsoft Word document. Must have the same structure as the TXT format.
guide.formats.hemisDesc: A specialized .txt file format for uploading to Uzbekistan's university HEMIS system.
guide.formats.kahootDesc: A ready-to-use .xlsx (Excel) file for uploading to the Kahoot platform. Perfect for interactive quizzes.
guide.tips.title: Frequently Asked Questions
guide.tips.q1: What format should the test file be in?
guide.tips.a1: Questions should be numbered (1., 2., ...). Answer options start with A), B), C), D). The correct answer is marked with * before the letter. For example: *A) Correct answer.
guide.tips.a2: The * (asterisk) symbol marks the correct answer. Each question must have at least one answer marked with an asterisk.
guide.tips.q3: Can I use the site offline?
guide.tips.a3: Yes! Once the site loads, it works without an internet connection. All processing happens in your browser.
guide.tips.a4: 100% safe. No files are sent to any server. All conversion happens within your browser. We don't store any data.
guide.tips.q5: What if questions get merged together?
guide.tips.a5: If a single question has too many answers, the system will try to automatically split them. However, it's best to number each question separately in your source file.
